taskSummary: Update the journals page to use GOV.UK Nunjucks macros for tabs and feedback, and remove the Back to Project button.
implementationDecisions: Replaced hand-authored journal tabs with the GOV.UK govukTabs macro.
Removed the Back to Project button from the journals template and journals-specific hydration behaviour.
Added macro-rendered feedback targets using govukErrorSummary for error messages.
Added macro-rendered feedback targets using govukNotificationBanner for non-error messages in the same location.
Added an href to the error-summary item so the rendered error summary contains the link used by the runtime feedback handler.
Routed runtime flash messages into the macro-rendered feedback targets.
Committed the rendered static journals HTML so preview deployments and route-state tests match the Nunjucks source.
validationAttempted: Opened PR #293 from fix/journals-tabs-feedback-macros-clean to main.
Let the Render GOV.UK pages workflow run.
Investigated CI failure and added the missing error-summary macro href.
Updated route-state tests to match the new tabs, feedback and removed back-link contracts.
validationPending: Latest GitHub Actions need to complete after trace correction before readiness is reported.
